strengths: 6+ years full-stack experience with TypeScript/Node.js and React across multiple senior roles
Hands-on AI agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators at current role
Strong testing/TDD culture with workshops, courses, and a custom test runner library
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in resume
Kotlin not listed; Java experience is dated (robotic arms work 2016-2018)
Vitest not explicitly cited, though Jest-equivalent testing expertise is evident
response.justification: Candidate clearly meets the 6+ years full-stack bar with TypeScript/Node/React at Optilyz, RIDE, and re:cinq, and uniquely matches the AI agent requirement via MCP generator work at re:cinq. Testing depth is evidenced by a custom D test runner (Trial), Fluent-Asserts, and Selenium/TDD courses. MongoDB, Docker, Git, and cloud (AWS CDK at Optilyz, Kubernetes for GISCollective) are all present. Gaps: Nest.js is not named, Vitest is not explicit (though Jest-class testing is covered), and Kotlin is absent with Java experience being older. Overall a strong match worth interviewing to probe Nest.js and Kotlin ramp-up.
